criteria.evidence: Constraints: Days until interview: 10; Rounds: recruiter screen (30m) → technical screen (60m...) → onsite (virtual: ML system design · past-project deep-dive · experimentation case · behavioral)
criteria.reason: Both the timeline (10 days) and the full round structure are captured and then actively used to drive the day-by-day cadence and sequencing.

criteria.evidence: Round-aware note: the recruiter screen needs only the pitch + stories + 'why Helio' — do not lead with ML system design there. Front-load the production-ML cluster for the technical screen and onsite, which are where it's actually tested.
criteria.reason: Sequencing matches the JD's three rounds exactly; the explicit note front-loads what each round tests and warns against leading with ML system design at the non-technical recruiter screen.

criteria.evidence: | 2 | Close the production-ML gap... | build-curriculum | technical modeling problem + onsite ML system design | ✅ |
criteria.reason: Every priority-queue action names a concrete skill and the specific round/gap it serves (Maps to column), with must-do flags distinguishing core from high-ROI extras.

criteria.evidence: Recall the production-ML lifecycle cold: notebook → serving → monitoring → drift detection → retraining, and sketch a churn-model serving design on a whiteboard in ~10 minutes.
criteria.reason: The 'Done looks like' bar is concrete and testable (deliver stories in <=90s, sketch a serving design in ~10 min, handle a window-function/CTE problem without hesitation), not platitudes.

criteria.evidence: build-curriculum — production-ML track... (Biggest gap, start early.)' and the watch-item is satisfied: build-curriculum for the real ML-production gap is a must-do (✅), while stories/experimentation are front-loaded for winnable cases.
criteria.reason: No mis-prioritization: the real gap (production ML) is the must-do curriculum focus, experimentation/SQL strengths are sharpened for the cases he can win, and the plan correctly avoids over-prepping ML at the recruiter screen.
